rationale: The claim is a non-numeric scope and interpretation boundary. It accurately limits the instance to descriptive GBD 2023 cardiovascular disease burden comparisons and helps prevent causal, mechanistic, clinical, or policy-effect overclaiming.
citation_rule: Use the IHME/GHDx GBD Results Tool citation recorded in the query profile and bundled citation file before final submission.
ui_rule: No numeric UI required for the boundary claim, but the boundary must state that numeric GBD claims retain UI values.
metric_rule: Boundary must require Number and Rate metrics to remain separate.
age_rule: Boundary must state that all-age counts and age-standardized rates are different age strategies.
wording_rule: Use descriptive wording only; do not write causal or intervention-effect language.
manuscript_action: Retain in Methods or Limitations as the interpretation boundary for this descriptive GBD analysis.
submission_upgrade_requirement: Promote only after final citation, reuse, and journal wording review are complete.

rationale: The source-backed values are usable, but the manuscript sentence should make the all-age Number metric explicit, retain both endpoint UIs, avoid causal language, and avoid implying that the percentage change has its own uncertainty interval.
citation_rule: Cite IHME/GHDx GBD Results Tool, GBD 2023, version_id 8352, exact query dimensions, access date, and bundled citation text.
ui_rule: Report UI for both 1990 and 2023 endpoint estimates; do not call UI a confidence interval or p value.
metric_rule: Number metric only; do not mix with rate or percent claims in the same sentence.
age_rule: All ages supports count burden only and is not age-standardized.
wording_rule: Use reviewed replacement wording: In GBD 2023, all-age cardiovascular disease deaths in China were estimated at 3,303,961.86 (UI 2,797,927.14-3,795,995.79) in 1990 and 4,501,842.59 (UI 3,855,077.51-5,013,029.84) in 2023, using the Number metric.
manuscript_action: Use the replacement wording in Results if the target journal permits this numeric density; otherwise move the endpoint estimates to a table and summarize directionally in text.
submission_upgrade_requirement: Promote only after human review confirms final citation, reuse terms, UI formatting, and target journal wording.

rationale: The DALY count claim is source-backed, but final wording must explicitly state all-age Number metric, include endpoint UIs, and avoid mechanism, diagnosis, or intervention-effect language.
citation_rule: Cite IHME/GHDx GBD Results Tool, GBD 2023, version_id 8352, exact query dimensions, access date, and bundled citation text.
ui_rule: Report UI for both 1990 and 2023 endpoint estimates; do not interpret DALYs mechanistically beyond GBD burden description.
metric_rule: Number metric only; keep separate from rate and percent metrics.
age_rule: All ages supports count burden only and is not age-standardized.
wording_rule: Use reviewed replacement wording: In GBD 2023, all-age cardiovascular disease DALYs in China were estimated at 81,454,987.01 (UI 68,389,231.42-94,748,209.77) in 1990 and 89,327,031.66 (UI 78,881,688.75-97,824,746.45) in 2023, using the Number metric.
manuscript_action: Use the replacement wording in Results or a main table; keep it separate from age-standardized rate comparisons.
submission_upgrade_requirement: Promote only after human review confirms final citation, reuse terms, UI formatting, and target journal wording.

rationale: The rate comparison is appropriate for China-global comparison, but final text must identify it as age-standardized Deaths Rate, retain UIs for all four endpoints, and avoid explaining why rates changed.
citation_rule: Cite IHME/GHDx GBD Results Tool, GBD 2023, version_id 8352, exact query dimensions, access date, and bundled citation text.
ui_rule: Report UI for all four endpoint rates; do not report uncertainty for derived percent change unless separately calculated.
metric_rule: Rate metric only; do not combine with all-age count claims in one sentence unless explicitly separated.
age_rule: Age-standardized rate supports location comparison better than all-age counts; do not describe as all-age rate.
wording_rule: Use reviewed replacement wording: For the age-standardized cardiovascular disease death rate in GBD 2023, China was estimated at 496.65 (UI 420.03-571.17) in 1990 and 208.03 (UI 178.08-233.08) in 2023, compared with global estimates of 375.51 (UI 346.66-401.06) in 1990 and 214.94 (UI 194.23-229.57) in 2023.
manuscript_action: Use the replacement wording as the main cross-location rate comparison, with Methods explicitly separating rate and count metrics.
submission_upgrade_requirement: Promote only after human review confirms final citation, reuse terms, UI formatting, and target journal wording.

rationale: The DALY rate comparison is source-backed but secondary to the death-rate comparison and adds substantial numeric density. It should remain supporting/table-level unless the manuscript's primary estimand explicitly includes DALY rates.
citation_rule: Cite IHME/GHDx GBD Results Tool, GBD 2023, version_id 8352, exact query dimensions, access date, and bundled citation text.
ui_rule: Report UI for all four endpoint rates; do not report uncertainty for derived percent change unless separately calculated.
metric_rule: Rate metric only; do not combine with all-age count claims in one sentence unless explicitly separated.
age_rule: Age-standardized rate supports location comparison better than all-age counts; do not describe as all-age rate.
wording_rule: Use descriptive DALY-rate wording only; avoid mechanism or intervention-effect language.
manuscript_action: Keep as supporting or table-only evidence; do not use as a leading narrative claim unless the final manuscript elevates DALY rates to a primary outcome.
submission_upgrade_requirement: Promote only after human review confirms final citation, reuse terms, UI formatting, and target journal wording.
